---
title: "Statistical Analysis"
subtitle: "Methodology · Part 2"
author: "Team HeeHaa"
date: last-modified
---

> *(placeholder)* This page documents the statistical methods used to define a
> baseline of "normal" behaviour and to detect departures from it.

## Defining the baseline

_Describe the baseline period and how per-agent / per-channel norms are computed._

## Abnormality scoring

_Explain the metric used to score how unusual a channel is for an agent
(e.g. deviation from baseline frequency), with formulas._

```{r}
#| label: stat-analysis
#| eval: false

# TODO: replace with your actual analysis code
```

## Robustness checks

_Describe sensitivity to the baseline choice and any significance testing._
